title: Extra RPG Attributes
body:
Extra RPG Attributes adds a bunch of attributes related to RPG or magical mechanics typically found in video games. Many of these attributes are inspired by video games such as Path of Exile and Last Epoch.

 

Reabsorption restores yellow hearts after not taking damage for 2 seconds, up to a maximum.

Glancing Blows is a mechanic that mitigates 35% of the damage something would do.

Spell Suppression mitigates 50% of the damage a spell would do.

Endurance % is the % of your health that is deducted from the damage a glancing blow would do.

Serenity % is the % chance a suppressed spell instead deals no damage.

% Determination is the % of damage that gets regenerated over time for the next 4 seconds.

 

This mod comes with several trinkets to get you started with the attributes, but it's recommended to use this mod with other mods that give the attributes through other means.
